howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.body: Before every preset application or manual edit, a snapshot of the ini files is saved locally in the app data folder (not next to game configs).

reset.noFiles: Override ini files are already gone — only GameUserSettings.ini (in-game menu) remains. A backup was created just in case.
reset.success: Override ini removed: {{files}}. GameUserSettings.ini kept. Backup {{backupId}}. Restart the game.
reset.sectionDesc: Deletes {{files}} — risky tweaks outside the in-game menu. GameUserSettings.ini (sg.* and menu settings) is left untouched.
reset.confirmBody: A backup is created before removal. The game must be closed. Continue?

empty.selectGameDesc: Open the library and select a game with config — the list of ini backups will appear here.

configMissing.title: Config not found — {{name}}
configMissing.body: In the library, click Set config and select Saved/Config/Windows, WindowsNoEditor, WinGDK, or WindowsClient. If it does not exist, launch the game once.

list.title: Backup list
list.emptyDesc: Apply a preset or save manual edits — the first copy will appear automatically.

banner.title: Backup created
banner.fallback: Backup {{backupId}}. Roll back in the "Backups" tab.
